sqlMap.select: select ITServiceKey, ITServiceCategoryKey from ITServices where ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ITServices set
where ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ITServices where ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
sqlMap.select: select ITServiceKey, ITServiceCategoryKey from ITServices where ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
select ITServiceKey, ITServiceCategoryKey from ITServices where ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
